decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Stale SCHEDULED corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run? — Mary Celeste 1872') was scheduled 2026-06-15T12:00Z and still marked SCHEDULED in shorts_state, but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, author Voidline). Auto-published silently 06-15 — same stale-state pattern as 06-13 reconcile. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z.

Today 2026-06-19 (Fri) NOT a publish day — 0 Shorts scheduled today. Next 3 days check: Sat 06-20 (none), Sun 06-21 (LONG-FORM + Reddit-seed day per Sunday-17:00 cadence), Mon 06-22 (v4_hook Short per SHORTS_PLAN). PIPELINE DRY for all three: v4 Roanoke long-form is NOT rendered (no runs/v4-roanoke/render/), NOT scheduled, NOT in any state — stuck at the 06-13 Flow thumb blocker (6 days). v4_hook/v4_answer Shorts not rendered or staged either. Last actual publish was 06-15 (v1_bonus_briggs); if nothing ships by ~06-22 the channel crosses a >7-day gap → KNOWN_BAD 'cadence <1 video/week'. Also: SHORTS_PLAN labels 06-22 as 'long-form ship day' which conflicts with the Sunday-17:00 cadence (Sunday is 06-21) — internal calendar inconsistency to resolve. No Reddit seed drafted this run (step 4 only fires on a long-form publish day; today is Friday). ACTION NEEDED before Sun 06-21: unblock Flow thumb + render + schedule v4, or accept the slip and re-date the calendar.
